data.body: ENDGAME: all 21 children CLOSED (16 certified; 5 needed handling: 6c4b/5899 had GENUINE gaps -> remediated via top commits 397/398 (git_adapter path constants + characterization test; CLI help --no-sync->--no-pull + goldens) then closed certified; 44be link made discoverable then certified; 9f40 + 8999 force-closed with documented reasons (flawed-AC premises: bash-migration delete false-premise; 8999 items 2/6/7/8 verified live/kept). EPIC effete-sanctified-sambar force-closed with comprehensive reason (4 failing items all stale-AC/process: c244 descoped+reparented to ace2, bash-migration justifiably kept, .joe-janitor artifacts uncommitted). Stack now 23 commits, tip after 397(6c4b remediation)+398(5899 remediation). Full local make lint+typecheck+test = 4654 passed 0 failed. c244 confirmed NOT a structural child (parent=ace2). Remaining: wait 397/398 Verified+1, then submit top of chain to land all 23 on main.
